title: Automated Deployment Pipeline for IT Capacity Planning
description: A flowchart illustrating the key stages and feedback loops in an automated deployment philosophy, showing how it enables efficient capacity scaling.
relationships: Code changes trigger the CI/CD pipeline
Built artifacts are stored in a repository
Deployment engine pulls artifacts for automated, consistent deployment
Staging environment validates performance and capacity before full production
Production monitoring provides real-time capacity data
Metrics dashboard feeds data back to capacity planning for future resource allocation
